description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that updates versions from a tag. The workflow triggers on push events with tags matching a specific pattern. It uses an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository, extract the version from the tag, and update various configuration files, including Windows installer config files, okjversion.h, RPM specfile, appstream xml, and deb config. The workflow also creates a tarball, releases it, and commits changes to the repository. Finally, it triggers a COPR build.
